chk_idempotency_scope_id.name: chk_idempotency_scope_id
chk_idempotency_scope_id.value: (((scope_type)::text = 'platform'::text) AND (scope_id IS NULL)) OR (((scope_type)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['tenant'::character varying, 'store'::character varying])::text[])) AND (scope_id IS NOT NULL))

chk_contact_preference_quiet_hours.name: chk_contact_preference_quiet_hours
chk_contact_preference_quiet_hours.value: (quiet_hours_start IS NULL) OR (quiet_hours_end IS NULL) OR (quiet_hours_start <> quiet_hours_end)
